title: Apple MacBook Pro 14" M3 Pro
description: The most powerful MacBook Pro ever. Features the M3 Pro chip with 12-core CPU and 18-core GPU, 18GB unified memory, and 512GB SSD. Perfect for developers, designers, and content creators who demand the best.

title: iPhone 15 Pro Max
description: Titanium design meets the A17 Pro chip. Features a 48MP main camera with 5x optical zoom, Action Button, and USB-C with USB 3 speeds. The most advanced iPhone ever made.

title: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: 200MP main camera, built-in S Pen, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor, 12GB RAM, and a stunning 6.8" QHD+ Dynamic AMOLED display. The ultimate Android flagship for power users.

title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise canceling with Auto NC Optimizer. Crystal clear hands-free calling with Speak-to-Chat. Up to 30-hour battery life. Multipoint connection for two devices simultaneously.

title: iPad Pro 12.9" M2 Wi-Fi
description: The ultimate iPad experience. M2 chip delivers next-level performance. Liquid Retina XDR display with ProMotion technology. Compatible with Apple Pencil (2nd gen) and Magic Keyboard.

title: Dell XPS 15 OLED (2024)
description: Premium Windows laptop with a stunning 15.6" OLED display, Intel Core i9-13900H, 32GB DDR5 RAM, 1TB NVMe SSD, and NVIDIA RTX 4070. CNC aluminum chassis for a sleek, professional look.

title: Apple Watch Series 9 GPS + Cellular
description: Smarter, brighter, more powerful. The new double tap gesture lets you control Apple Watch without touching the display. S9 chip, Always-On Retina display, advanced health features including ECG and blood oxygen.

title: Samsung 65" Neo QLED 4K TV
description: Quantum Matrix Technology with Neo Quantum Processor 4K. Mini LED backlighting for exceptional contrast and brightness. 120Hz refresh rate, HDR2000, built-in Amazon Alexa and Bixby voice assistants.

title: Logitech MX Master 3S
description: The master of mice is back, now with near-silent clicks. 8K DPI optical tracking on any surface including glass. MagSpeed electromagnetic scroll wheel — 90% quieter. USB-C charging, 70 days on full charge.

title: Dell UltraSharp 27" 4K USB-C
description: 27" IPS 3840x2160 monitor with stunning color accuracy (factory-calibrated), thin bezels, and a USB-C hub for single-cable laptop charging and display. Ideal for design, productivity, and crisp 4K content.

title: AirPods Pro (2nd Generation)
description: Up to 2x more Active Noise Cancellation than first generation. Adaptive Transparency lets ambient sound in while protecting your hearing. Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking. MagSafe charging case.

title: Samsung T7 Portable SSD 2TB
description: Blazing fast 1050 MB/s read and 1000 MB/s write speeds over USB 3.2 Gen 2 interface. Password protection with AES 256-bit hardware encryption. Shock-resistant compact metal design. Works on PC, Mac, and Android.
